title: Darkening Green
content:
My mind, rarely with me alone,
    parts with energy,
    the floor boards scuffed
    and landing beams just
    roosts big enough for pigeons
    on leave from fields
    darker for their grain.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Paul Cameron Brown, titled "Darkening Green", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
